opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I haven't been to the toilet in nearly a week, my stomach is completely bloated, and the cramping is unbearable when I try to push.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been 6 days, I'm bloated and cramping badly, and I'm worried something is blocked.

symptom_narrative.character: colicky lower abdominal cramps, bloating, hard lumpy stools, straining, incomplete emptying
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable cramping on pushing; very bloated
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: colicky, eases briefly with passing wind
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: still passing wind; no vomiting, no blood, no weight loss
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: long-standing tendency to constipation, sometimes needs to splint
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: very uncomfortable, frequent unsuccessful toilet visits

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; low fibre/fluid pattern; anxious about the abdomen

objective_data_offered.value: no bowel motion for ~6 days, small hard lumpy stool 3 days ago, still passing wind
